user.title: EZVIZ Open API
user.description: Enter the appKey/appSecret from https://isgpopen.ezviz.com (Console → App Key Management). These are NOT your app login.

data.verify_ssl: Verify TLS certificate (disable only behind a corporate MITM proxy)

app.title: EZVIZ account (optional — for door unlock)
app.description: Door unlock is not available via the Open API. To enable it, enter your EZVIZ app account (email/phone + password). Leave both blank to skip — streaming still works.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate EZVIZ Open API
reauth_confirm.description: Your appKey/appSecret were rejected. Enter valid credentials.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid appKey/appSecret, or wrong region gateway.
error.invalid_account: EZVIZ account login failed — check email/phone and password.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the EZVIZ Open API.

data.protocol: Stream protocol (hls is the most compatible)
data.verify_codes: Verify codes for encrypted devices, one per line: SERIAL=CODE
data.password: EZVIZ account password — for door unlock
data.door_no: ISAPI door number on the station (1 = first lock; try 2/3 for multi-lock stations)

error.invalid_account: EZVIZ account login failed — check email/phone and password.
